# services.zammad

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.zammad`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.zammad.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Path to a folder that will contain Zammad working directory. |
| `services.zammad.database.createLocally` | `boolean` | Whether to create a local database automatically. |
| `services.zammad.database.host` | `string` | Database host address. |
| `services.zammad.database.name` | `string` | Database name. |
| `services.zammad.database.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | A file containing the password for {option}`services.zammad.database.user`. |
| `services.zammad.database.port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Database port. Use `null` for default port. |
| `services.zammad.database.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | The {file}`database.yml` configuration file as key value set. See \<TODO> for list of configuration parameters. |
| `services.zammad.database.user` | `null or string` | Database user. |
| `services.zammad.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zammad, a web-based, open source user support/ticketing solution. |
| `services.zammad.group` | `string` | Name of the Zammad group. |
| `services.zammad.host` | `string` | Host address. |
| `services.zammad.nginx.configure` | `boolean` | Whether to configure a local nginx for Zammad. |
| `services.zammad.nginx.domain` | `string` | The domain under which zammad will be reachable. |
| `services.zammad.package` | `package` | The zammad package to use. |
| `services.zammad.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Web service port. |
| `services.zammad.redis.createLocally` | `boolean` | Whether to create a local redis automatically. |
| `services.zammad.redis.host` | `string` | Redis server address. |
| `services.zammad.redis.name` | `string` | Name of the redis server. Only used if `createLocally` is set to true. |
| `services.zammad.redis.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the redis server. |
| `services.zammad.secretKeyBaseFile` | `null or absolute path` | The path to a file containing the `secret_key_base` secret. Zammad uses `secret_key_base` to encrypt the cookie store, which contains session data, and to digest user auth tokens. Needs to be a 64 byte long string of hexadecimal characters. You can generate one by running `openssl rand -hex 64 >/path/to/secret_key_base_file` This should be a string, not a nix path, since nix paths are copied into the world-readable nix store. |
| `services.zammad.user` | `string` | Name of the Zammad user. |
| `services.zammad.websocketPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Websocket service port. |
